# Vault Baseline — 2026-07-19

**Generated by the consolidation baseline run (Pass 0–2 of the [[Consolidation and Enrichment Programme]], ADR-0007).** Snapshot: HEAD `6bdac9f` + the 2026-07-19 working tree (charter, ADR-0007, registries — committed with this report). Method: deterministic registry pack (`scripts/vault_baseline.py` → `_meta/consolidation/data/`, 7 JSONs) + 8 parallel domain readers + adversarial verification by the `audit-critic` agent (**67 findings CONFIRMED · 1 DEFLATED · 1 REJECTED**; corrected figures applied throughout). Read-only on existing notes: this run changed **no** existing content note. Companions: [[Overlap Registry]] · [[Canonical Note Registry]]. **Hard stop per the programme: nothing below executes until Orfeas reviews §17.**

---

## 1. Executive assessment

The vault is **healthy at the core and drifted at the edges**. The doctrine spine (The Heart → Operating Doctrine → Selection Engine) is authorship-intact with healthy hub-and-spoke citation; the held-in-reserve check passes vault-wide; the n8n purge holds (zero live prescriptions); all 11 schema-note↔CSV contracts are field-level in sync; and the tracer discipline is clean — **no tracer fact exists only in a session log** (the programme's landing criterion already passes).

The debt is concentrated and nameable:
1. **The SOP layer is tracer-blind.** All 12 operational SOPs predate the interview and mention none of its discovery layer (grep-proven). 9 of 12 carry P1 contradictions — three structural fault lines do most of the damage: the DAILY/ΠΡΩΤΟ actionable-vs-held split missing from every state note; a hard payment gate encoded three times where reality runs a soft gate over `paid ≥ delivered`; unitary order lines where reality forks quantities through ΚΟΥΒΑΣ.
2. **49 schema corrections are staged, none landed** — mapped one-by-one in §7, with 9 new tables, 24 open decisions, and 1 blocked item.
3. **Steering has competing voices** — 10 confirmed conflicts (§4), headline: a phantom "Builder's Manual" asserted by the state note, and the waterfall-vs-instance-first doctrine contradiction whose ADR is now due.
4. **The generated layer leaked twice and staled twice** because the freshness guard covers only 1 of 6 artifacts.
5. **Confidential figures sit outside their canonical homes** in a known, small set of locations (§5 OV-08 + the revenue-figure pair the critic added).

Nothing found requires destructive surgery. The consolidation is a sequence of ownership declarations, link repairs, redactions-to-pointers, and reconciliations — most riding the already-planned tracer landing (Pass 4).

## 2. What must be protected (the untouchable list)

Doctrine & personal (authorship line, CLAUDE §5–6): **The Heart** (50 inbound — highest blast radius) · **Afoi Deli — Operating Doctrine** · **The Selection Engine** incl. its (stated)/(inferred)/(model) provenance markers and §8 open questions · **17_JOURNAL** (opaque to consolidation) · **15_PERSONAL_LIFE** seeds · **12_PERSONAL_OS** content (link/frontmatter repair only as a reviewed batch) · **16_IDEAS_AND_VISION** seeds · the **held-in-reserve absence itself** (propagation ceiling: Session 2026-06-14:51/:81; precedent: vault-audit SKILL:73).

Evidence class (immutable): **Order Lifecycle — Ground-Truth Capture** (the tracer — SOPs change, the capture doesn't; sole legitimate holder of its confidential figures) · every **`_sources/`** folder · the **Tracer v0.1 draft** (in Downloads — flag: file into `_exhibits/tracer/` at landing) · **stash@{0}** (the discarded sweep = the cooling period; never drop/pop without Orfeas) · the **123 empty supplier dirs** until their name-census is captured into the future Source Manifest · **Sessions/ + Brainstorms/** logs (historical trail — Mercareon stays in the two old logs by design).

Contracts & machinery: **CSV headers** (no edit before the schema-diff is approved) · the **2026-06-07 stratum** in 01_COMPANY_CORE (until the §17 stratum decision) · **Supplier - Kronos §Pricing** (danger-classified) · the README **generated block** (changes only via `/repo-analysis`) · the guard's fail-open design · the charter↔runner skill split (vault-audit / os-brainstorm pattern) · the audit system's proposes-only safety case · the `[!question] (your knowledge)` prompt mechanism in dossiers (the enrichment contract — merges must not flatten prompts).

## 3. Current canonical map

Full map: [[Canonical Note Registry]] (4 domains, ~40 truth rows). Summary of unhealthy rows:
- **duplicated (repair via [[Overlap Registry]]):** execution queue (OV-09/14) · session ritual (OV-11) · question registers (OV-10) · status semantics (OV-02) · ΚΟΥΒΑΣ mechanics (OV-03) · data-contract fields vs SOP yaml (OV-05) · supplier commercial terms (OV-08) · porcelain prose (OV-06) · Pierre Vive facts (OV-07) · dossier slot vocabulary (OV-12/01) · conduit retellings (OV-17) · hub links (OV-13)
- **contested (Orfeas rules):** "one fabric" home · north-star sentence · positioning line (OV-15) · customer-type reads (OV-16) · exception-taxonomy ownership · Cost & Quote Build's figures
- **no-owner (homes needed):** folder-semantics owner (post-reconciliation → FSM) · payment-gate owner (→ Finance SOP) · inbound-logistics chain · source metadata (→ Source Manifest) · knowledge gaps (→ Knowledge Action Register) · instance-first doctrine (→ its ADR)
- **hollow:** Decision Log (declared business-decision home, zero entries) · People and Roles Map (routes "the people", holds only functional roles)

## 4. Steering conflicts (all critic-CONFIRMED)

1. **Builder's Manual phantom** — VSM:46/:76 + Roadmap:13 assert it exists; nothing on disk; the false claims were never corrected though the gap is registered in 4 places.
2. **Waterfall vs instance-first** — three notes state the waterfall as live rule; the backlog records it challenged; the candidate ADR was never filed. Two contradictory sequencing doctrines are simultaneously "active."
3. **Two ritual definitions** — Session Protocol omits The Heart, Capture Backlog, and the hook-enforced analysis refresh that CLAUDE.md mandates, while CLAUDE.md delegates "full workflow" to it.
4. **Three priority systems** — Capture Backlog (canonical) vs frozen Current Priorities vs Roadmap phases. Exactly what ADR-0007 rec. 2 bans.
5. **Question registers** — declared OQ/QTR split with one side dead and tracer-answered rows unmarked; a third surface (the Register) arrives with the programme.
6. **Weekly Review** — decided dormant twice, still `active/weekly`, no banner.
7. **Decision Log vs practice** — the declared business-decision home has never held one; decisions land in ADR Consequences, logs, backlog.
8. **State ahead of disk (in-flight)** — VSM:53 recorded this baseline before its files existed; resolves at this session's close.
9. **Hubs omit the queue** — Collaboration Home doesn't link Capture Backlog; Home Dashboard's review block routes only to dead surfaces.
10. **Roadmap vs demonstrated state** — Phase 0 "IN PROGRESS" with the memory loop "unconfirmed" against 19 sessions of proof.

## 5. Overlap registry

17 genuine clusters + 7 charitable-read clearances: [[Overlap Registry]]. By type: 2 exact (OV-01 template duplicate · OV-15 positioning line) · 9 partial · 4 stale-copy (OV-04 payment gate ×3 · OV-05 SOP yaml vs CSV · OV-06 porcelain residue · OV-11 ritual) · 2 historical (OV-09 Current Priorities · OV-14 Roadmap). Confidentiality-duplication cluster: **OV-08** (Kronos terms at 4 live locations outside §Pricing) plus the critic's addition — the **~€15m+ revenue figure** duplicated at `Afoi Deli Master Profile:38` + `VSM:87` (single-source `needs_check` fact maintained twice).

## 6. Stale & historical files (risk of being mistaken as current)

Ranked by newcomer risk (critic-confirmed): **1)** VSM:46 + Roadmap:13 phantom claims (stale text inside *current* surfaces — worst class) · **2)** the raw redoal draft in `_sources/` — **no banner/frontmatter**; an agent grepping could adopt the un-reconciled six-value enum or Register-as-queue that ADR-0007 reversed · **3)** Current Priorities (frozen, unbannered, `active`) · **4)** Weekly Review (reads as a practiced ritual; never ran) · **5)** README_START_HERE (bannered, but body still teaches the waterfall + 4-layer model; `status: active`) · **6)** Roadmap + Open Questions (bannered-by-CLAUDE §1 but internally un-annotated) · **7)** the 123 empty supplier dirs (structure that looks like content) · **8)** dated logs/reports (inherently historical, low risk; the 2026-06-16 audit's Appendix contains old CLAUDE.md drop-in text an agent must not re-apply) · **9)** stale auto-memory F-numbering (outside the vault; fixed this session).

**Beyond the 49 (found by contract comparison, must ride the same diff):** (a) `ready_for_delivery` formula (Orders Schema:44/:53) contradicts #27+#28; (b) `ORD-YYYYMMDD-CLIENT` ID convention (DMS:58) breaks under #3; (c) `LOAD-SUPPLIER-YYYYMMDD` (DMS:65) pre-judges D-SHIPMENT-TIER; (d) single `delivered_date` (Order Lines:40) cannot express #26; (e) ISS↔EHR field-vocabulary drift (`related_order_line` vs `affected_line`).

**SOP debt (Layer B):** 9 P1 / 3 P2 — reconciliation order: state-spine cluster (Order Workflow + FSM + Kouvas) → Warehouse Receiving → Delivery + Exceptions → Finance → Proforma → P2 trio (PO Creation, DTS/Loading, Operations Map). Every changed rule links its tracer evidence; every SOP gains the charter header (`ground_truth_sources / last_reconciled / owner / confidence / known_exceptions / system_implications`).

## 8. Knowledge-depth gaps

Scorecard headline (0–10 ladder): the **order spine** domains sit at 5–6 (exceptions + economics captured, no real instances landed); **supplier commercial depth** at 2–4 (1 of 13 dossiers privately enriched); **materials** at 4 (1 class note verified, 1 collection, SKU tier empty); **AP/AR mechanics** at 5 (captured, unlanded); **rebates/returns/stock** at 5 (discovered by the tracer, unmodeled); **people layer** at 1–2 (hollow map); **cases** at 0 (folder unborn). The three parked deep-dives (Kostas's period-bending · per-category lead-time table · break-even signal) and interview 1 (ΚΟΥΒΑΣ) are the highest-yield next extractions.

## 9. Supplier & product ingestion readiness

**Exists:** the public-research pipeline (Supplier Research Workflow, Kronos-depth contract) · the collection pipeline (ADR-0005, Collection Schema, PDF tooling proven end-to-end on Pierre Vive) · one `_sources/` archive precedent (Kronos) · roster ✅/⬚ pattern · the enrichment-queue prompt mechanism. **Missing (programme gates):** the **Supplier Source Manifest** (no hashing, no `source_type` vocabulary, no supersession chains, no rights/confidentiality classification at source layer) · `/source-manifest` + `/supplier-ingest` + `/collection-ingest` skills · category adapters beyond tile (tap and sanitaryware pilots will force the design) · `_sources` for 12 of 13 suppliers. **Pilot recommendation (from suppliers actually carried):** 1) **Kronos** (tile matrix — half-run already; complete by walking the remaining listino pages + a second collection, e.g. Nativa, retrofitting the manifest) · 2) **Fantini** (tap configuration — the PVD-finish programme + rough-in body traps its dossier already names) · 3) **Cielo** (sanitaryware/furniture components — typology + colour palettes + thin-ceramic line). Parquet can't pilot (none carried); Scavolini waits for the kitchen turn. **Sweep redo:** inputs recoverable — stash@{0} (41 dossiers, 3,129 lines) + the 123-dir name census; redo runs supplier-by-supplier through the manifest pipeline with Orfeas's narration, per his decision.

## 10. Case-library readiness

`02_OPERATIONS_OS/Cases/` is unborn (correct — born with the golden case). The tracer narrates enough real material to seed **5 of the 10 programme archetypes immediately** at landing: the golden Skintzi order (normal multi-supplier + wrinkle) · proforma-mismatch · partial receipt with child back-order (the separation mechanic) · partial delivery with intermediate payment · transport breakage/claim (the post-it). The remaining archetypes (WAIT-line · mixed procurement · client return into ΣΚΟΥΠΑ · architect rebate settlement · urgency split-load) each need one real case pulled from memory/artifacts — candidates for the Knowledge Action Register.

## 11. Audit improvements (v2 delta)

Genuinely new vs `/vault-audit` today: **session-close lint** (deterministic per-session gate — nothing backs it yet; `scripts/vault_baseline.py` is 70% of its engine) · **weekly delta audit** (change-scoped: duplicated-fact, canonical-competitor, confidential-copy, source→downstream propagation checks) · **monthly structural** (registry/overlap review, tracer burn-down, schema-example coverage, historical-as-current as a named check) · **quarterly adversarial** (8 critic lenses vs today's 1+3; richer verdict taxonomy) · **metrics-as-trends** (new classes: canonical/supporting/historical counts, verified-fact %, sources↔notes coverage, confidential-duplication rate). **Must reconcile first:** the charter permits narrow mechanical auto-fixes; vault-audit SKILL forbids all note edits — one must yield explicitly (proposed: the skill stays read-only; auto-fixes run only in build sessions under the charter's four conditions). Bookkeeping owed: STATE.md ledger refresh (F4 re-arm as the schema-diff trigger; F6 pointed at Pass 4) + the missing 2026-06-19 charter-table row.

## 12. Agent improvements

Existing `audit-critic` performed to contract (67/1/1 with corrected counts). Next agents to formalize, in need-order: **Ground-Truth Interviewer** (charter exists in the tracer method — formalize before interview 1) · **Schema Reconciliation** (Pass 4 Layer C executor) · **Security Classifier** (the baseline's heuristic scan found real leaks the generator missed; needs Greek-script names, structural price-pattern detection — see §13) · **Contradiction Critic** (the steering-conflict class recurs) · **Session Closer** (backs the session-close lint). The Supplier/Product Ingestion agent extends the two research workflows — resolve their latent dual-home clauses first (G9).

## 13. Tooling improvements

`scripts/vault_baseline.py` shipped (UTF-8-safe, locations-only sensitivity, JSON+MD out) — now needs: `revenue_figure` precision (matches bare "revenue" — 6+ false positives), `client_identity` Greek-script coverage (missed the Greek surname in the Cockpit note), fixtures/tests + `--check` semantics per the programme's script contract. **Guard gap (root cause of the G3/G4/G5 staleness):** `.claude/hooks/git-sync-guard.mjs` checks only REPO_ANALYSIS and *exempts* the rest of `docs/` — extend to the suite (or add the planned `generated_file_freshness.py`). `/repo-analysis` skill: fix the internal Step-4-vs-output-4 README contract duplication; add snapshot SHAs + per-run date refresh to all suite headers; regenerate to clear the two leaks (G1 band+cadence → existence-name, G2 client name → anonymize), the stale counts (WORKFLOW_TREE:55 batches; RELATIONSHIP_TREES:91 ×18 + :92 ADRs ×6), and the VISION header date. Script backlog next: `generated_file_freshness.py` · `source_manifest.py` (hashing exists in baseline) · `controlled_vocab_validate.py` · `tracer_correction_tracker.py` (the §7 matrix is its seed data).

## 14. Proposed ADRs (in filing order)

1. **ADR-0008 — Instance-first sequencing** (due now; filing condition — tracer done — arrived 2026-07-18). Supersedes the waterfall texts; unblocks the Roadmap fork and Session Protocol/README_START_HERE rewrites.
2. **ADR-0009 — `canonicality` + `data_classification` frontmatter** (promised by ADR-0007 rec. 3; classification inputs in §17).
3. **ADR-0010 — Verification-status tier boundary** (notes keep the 4-value `confidence` + derived 3-value DB mapping; the 6-value native set applies to product/SKU-tier records only; amends Materials Schema :96-107 + Collection Schema :88 wording).
4. **ADR-0011 — External-system boundaries** (MEGASOFT = AR source of record · Kostas-Excel = AP source of record · stock Excel = inventory source; the vault/OS mirrors, never masters) — formalizes corrections 2/32/44's architecture before any CSV lands.
5. **Amendment to ADR-0005** (one line): born-on-ingestion generalized from collections to all entity notes + homes (closing the scope mismatch).
6. **Optional micro-ADR:** CSV-as-canonical + AP/AR split provenance (currently session-log-only; ADR-0004's "recorded late" lesson argues for it).

## 15. First 20 knowledge actions (for Orfeas, ordered)

Decision-class (unblock consolidation): **1)** the 2026-06-07 stratum — adopt or archive (incl. north star + "quiet precision" authorship) · **2)** Roadmap — rewrite instance-first vs mark historical · **3)** Current Priorities — authored framing or scaffold · **4)** Decision Log — activate (backfill) or retire · **5)** Session Protocol — synced mirror or slim pointer · **6)** Cost & Quote Build — reference-only or second controlled home for buy-side figures · **7)** "one fabric" — CLAUDE.md or write into The Heart.
Tracer-landing inputs: **8)** file the proforma exhibit + verify the DA/AC/TR/PR/OR legend (unblocks #15) · **9)** MEGASOFT export capabilities (D-MEGASOFT) · **10)** Kostas-Excel structure + a Kostas people-note seed (D-KOSTAS-EXCEL) · **11)** ELXIS shipment structure + transport-allocation basis (D-SHIPMENT-TIER + D-ALLOCATION) · **12)** which event flips status 1 today · **13)** what sends DAILY→ΠΡΩΤΟ besides ΑΝΑΜΟΝΗ · **14)** released_for_loading trigger + owner · **15)** utility-folder census (numbering 00–09) · **16)** ΣΚΟΥΠΑ ledger file (columns, maintainer, origin-tagging) · **17)** transport-credit post-its (count/value/chaser) · **18)** `wait_type` full value set + is "DTS" a real term · **19)** ΕΚΘΕΣΗ ΠΕΡΙΣΤΕΡΙ MEGASOFT identity (null-client path) · **20)** rebate-sheet keying (order vs project) + stock-Excel joinability/scale.

## 16. Change sequence

**A (this session — done):** programme filed (charter + ADR-0007) · sweep stashed · baseline + registries + this report committed.
**B (Orfeas reviews §17 — the hard gate).**
**C (mechanical batch, post-approval, one session):** strike the two phantom claims · F1/F2 template fixes · Weekly Review dormancy banner · redoal raw-source banner · hub link repairs (OV-13) · Selection Engine enum line · Vault Map rows (`scripts/`, `_meta/consolidation/`) · STATE.md ledger refresh + charter-table row · `/repo-analysis` regeneration clearing leaks + stale counts · scanner precision fixes.
**D (ADR batch):** ADR-0008 instance-first → ADR-0009 fields → ADR-0010 verification tiers → ADR-0011 system boundaries (+ ADR-0005 amendment). Then governance rules A–J into CLAUDE.md.
**E (Pass 3 steering):** Roadmap fork · Current Priorities merge · QTR annotation · Decision Log outcome · Session Protocol sync · README_START_HERE rewrite.
**F (Pass 4 — the tracer landing, #1 content action):** Layer A S1–S15 narrative → Layer B SOP reconciliation (§7 order) → Layer C schema-diff execution (§7 matrix; CSVs change here, after D) → Layer D golden case (births `Cases/` + `_exhibits/tracer/`).
**G (enrichment loop):** interview 1 ΚΟΥΒΑΣ → parked deep-dives → Source Manifest → sweep redo pilots (Kronos/Fantini/Cielo) → case archetypes → audit v2 cadence live.

## 17. Decisions required from Orfeas

The seven decision-class actions in §15 (stratum · Roadmap · Current Priorities · Decision Log · Session Protocol · Cost & Quote Build · one-fabric), plus: **8)** approve the [[Overlap Registry]] cluster dispositions (esp. OV-01 retire, OV-09 merge, OV-17 conduit trims — the authored-text cautions are flagged per cluster) · **9)** approve §16's sequence (esp. that Layer C CSV edits wait for ADR-0011) · **10)** generator redactions — confirm the suite should existence-name the markup band and anonymize the client mention (critic: real leaks, minor) · **11)** the roster "On afoideli.gr" column (keep as pilot data vs strip) · **12)** the three paused Materials decisions (pattern / batch size / 16→19 split) — Root B stays behind the tracer either way · **13)** people notes timing (before or after consolidation repoints the hollow aliases) · **14)** Weekly Review revival condition ("until the data layer exists"?) · **15)** confirm the sweep stash cooling policy (keep until manifest-redo, or drop after census capture).
